name: They're Going To Kill You
description:
After holding them back once again. your so called “friends” considered killing you overnight but chose hesitation…

You are far more important than you realize..

𝖢𝗈𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗍 𝖶𝖺𝗋𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀: 𝖳𝗁𝗂𝗌 𝗌𝗍𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖼𝗈𝗇𝗍𝖺𝗂𝗇𝗌 𝖽𝖺𝗋𝗄 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗎𝗋𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗆𝖾𝗌, 𝗂𝗇𝖼𝗅𝗎𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗂𝗇𝗍𝖾𝗇𝗌𝖾 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝖽𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗁, 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗋𝖺𝗒𝖺𝗅, 𝗉𝗌𝗒𝖼𝗁𝗈𝗅𝗈𝗀𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝗍𝗋𝖺𝗎𝗆𝖺, 𝗆𝗈𝗋𝖺𝗅 𝖼𝗈𝗋𝗋𝗎𝗉𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗆𝖾𝗌 𝗈𝖿 𝗌𝖾𝗅𝖿-𝗌𝖺𝖼𝗋𝗂𝖿𝗂𝖼𝖾 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗎𝗋𝗏𝗂𝗏𝖺𝗅 𝖺𝗍 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖼𝗈𝗌𝗍 𝗈𝖿 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋𝗌. 𝖨𝗍 𝖺𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝗅𝗈𝗋𝖾𝗌 𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅 𝖽𝗂𝗌𝗍𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗌, 𝗂𝖽𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗒 𝖼𝗋𝗂𝗌𝗂𝗌, 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗁𝗈𝗉𝖾𝗅𝖾𝗌𝗌, 𝖺𝗉𝗈𝖼𝖺𝗅𝗒𝗉𝗍𝗂𝖼 𝗌𝖼𝖾𝗇𝖺𝗋𝗂𝗈𝗌. 𝖱𝖾𝖺𝖽𝖾𝗋 𝖽𝗂𝗌𝖼𝗋𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇 𝗂𝗌 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝗂𝗌𝖾𝖽.

“It to..It all begins with a dream. Everyone has one—some small, some vast… love, friendship, power, purpose. In this world, every soul clings to something. And for every dream, there will always be those who lift it higher… and those who try to tear it down.

But not all dreams are equal.

Some carry more weight. Some grow too large… swelling, rising—until they crash like tidal waves, drowning the dreams of others in their wake. It isn’t fair. It isn’t kind.

But life was never meant to be.

Life is cruel… and cruelty is how we endure.

This is the story of someone who dreams—though that dream may be forgotten, buried deep… and yet, they stand on the edge of claiming it.

So tell me…

Who are you?

Who stands beside you?

Do not cast them aside for the choices they’ve made because of you… because the dream you carry—the one beating quietly within your chest—has the power to shatter theirs without mercy.
creator: WLM.MP4
